candidates.reason: Unsafe use of strcpy allows overflow of ssid_tmp buffer.
Unsafe use of strcpy allows overflow of password_tmp buffer.
strcat appends user input to config->topic without checking buffer bounds.
User input from 'log=' line is passed directly as the format string to printf.
Authentication check relies on hardcoded credentials.
